use_cases: Display video timestamps in media players and video platforms
Show elapsed time in timers, stopwatches, and session trackers
Format video duration for content management systems
Display time-based metrics in dashboards and analytics tools
Show timestamps in live streaming interfaces
ai_summary: A lightweight timestamp formatting component that converts seconds into readable time (HH:MM:SS or MM:SS format). Built with a dark, minimalist design using neutral-950 background and white text, ideal for embedding in video players, media platforms, or analytics dashboards where time visualization is needed.
